text: I hope life is soft to you.
I hope every dream finds you gently.
I hope you always feel loved, even from far away.
I hope the world gives you back the kindness you give.
You are my favorite almost-everything.
Somewhere between your laugh and your voice, I got stuck.
You make ordinary days feel like a scene.
You feel like a song I don’t want to end.
Thank you for being a chapter I’ll reread in my heart.
Even if life takes us different places, I’ll always be grateful it gave me you.
You made me feel things I didn’t know I was still capable of feeling.
I hope one day you see yourself the way I see you.
I hope your music never leaves you.
I hope you always find a reason to smile.
I hope your heart stays warm, no matter where you go.
I hope you become everything you secretly pray for.
I hope you know how easy you are to love.
You were never just someone to me.
I’ll always have a soft corner with your name on it.
Meeting you was my favorite plot twist.
Some people don’t stay forever, but they change forever.
You made my heart feel brave again.
I’ll miss you in the quietest ways.
You’ll always be one of my sweetest memories.
